/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_lorawan.dir/src/signal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_lorawan.dir/src/fft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_lorawan.dir/src/sampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_lorawan.dir/src/lorawan_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_lorawan.dir/tests/test_lorawan.cpp.o -o test_lorawan  -lm libkissfft.a
